presentationTitle: Coinbase: Your Hosted Bitcoin Wallet (YC Demo Day 2012)

slides.title: Coinbase - Your Hosted Bitcoin Wallet
slides.bodyText: Your hosted bitcoin wallet. Shows Coinbase logo with blue database icon, tagline, and three product screenshots (desktop browser, mobile phone, tablet) displaying the Coinbase wallet interface with transaction history.
slides.fontStyle: Light sans-serif, large title in dark gray, 'bitcoin' highlighted in blue

slides.title: Bitcoin: A New Digital Currency
slides.bodyText: Three key benefits of Bitcoin listed with icons: Instant (clock icon), International (globe icon), No Transaction Fees (prohibition sign icon).
slides.fontStyle: Thin sans-serif (Helvetica Neue Light style), large centered title, large bullet text

slides.title: Bitcoin: A New Digital Currency
slides.bodyText: Global adoption visualization showing a 3D globe with colored vertical bars/spikes emanating from various countries, indicating Bitcoin transaction activity worldwide. Concentration visible in US, Europe, and East Asia.

slides.title: Bitcoin Growth
slides.bodyText: $2 million USD per day in transaction volume. Line chart showing Bitcoin transaction volume from March through August, with a strong upward trend and spikes reaching 50k-60k range by August.
slides.fontStyle: Thin sans-serif title, small body text, chart labels in gray

slides.title: Early Adopters
slides.bodyText: Word cloud of Bitcoin early adopter use cases: international payments, virtual goods, games, developing world, peer-to-peer, remittance, micro-transactions, e-commerce. Words vary in size suggesting relative importance.
slides.fontStyle: Thin sans-serif, varying font sizes to create word-cloud effect

slides.title: Too Difficult To Use
slides.bodyText: Compares 'Current Tools' (showing a clunky desktop client and command-line terminal) with 'Coinbase' (showing clean web and mobile interfaces). Demonstrates the UX gap Coinbase fills.
slides.fontStyle: Thin sans-serif title, section labels in gray/blue

slides.title: Coinbase: A Hosted Bitcoin Wallet
slides.bodyText: Product demo showing the Coinbase web interface on desktop browser and mobile phone. Displays transaction history, balance, send/receive money features. Clean, consumer-friendly UI.

slides.title: Coinbase : Bitcoin :: iTunes : MP3
slides.bodyText: Simple analogy slide positioning Coinbase's relationship to Bitcoin as equivalent to iTunes' relationship to MP3. 'Coinbase' and 'iTunes' in dark blue, 'Bitcoin' and 'MP3' in gray.
slides.fontStyle: Thin sans-serif, large centered text, two-tone color for emphasis

slides.title: Coinbase Signups
slides.bodyText: Daily Signups line chart from Aug 2 to Aug 18 showing exponential hockey-stick growth. Annotation: '20% Daily' growth rate. Chart shows signups accelerating from near-zero to ~4.5k daily.
slides.fontStyle: Thin sans-serif title, bold annotation text, chart labels in gray

slides.title: Coinbase Transactions
slides.bodyText: Transaction Volume (BTC) line chart from Jul 23 to Aug 13 showing exponential growth in BTC transaction volume, peaking near 1,000 BTC. Annotation: '$65,000 USD in the first 5 weeks'.
slides.fontStyle: Thin sans-serif title, bold annotation text, chart labels in gray

slides.title: Coinbase - Closing / Contact
slides.bodyText: Coinbase logo with tagline 'Your hosted bitcoin wallet'. Scatter plot showing transaction/trade/currency data over time (about 2 minutes window). Contact: @coinbase.com displayed prominently at bottom with blue banner.
slides.fontStyle: Mixed: logo font for brand, thin sans-serif for tagline, bold for contact URL

source: Coinbase YC Demo Day pitch deck, Summer 2012 (S12 batch)
